title: Founding Apple
description: Apple Computer is founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak in the Jobs family garage, starting a revolution in personal computing.

title: The Macintosh
description: Launch of the first mass-market personal computer with a graphical user interface, introduced by the iconic '1984' commercial.

title: The Return
description: Jobs returns to Apple as iCEO and begins the 'Think Different' campaign, initiating one of the greatest turnarounds in business history.

title: The iPod
description: Apple revolutionizes the music industry with '1,000 songs in your pocket,' changing how we consume media forever.

title: The iPhone
description: Reinvents the phone, the internet, and mobile computing. A single device that changed the world's digital landscape.

title: Legacy
description: Steve Jobs passes away, leaving a legacy of innovation that continues to inspire dreamers and creators globally.
